title: Toolbar mode toggle buttons for 3D vs 2D reclassification
capture_instructions: Close-up of the toolbar area. Reclassify Points is active. The additional 3D/2D mode toggle buttons should be visible in the toolbar. The 2D button should be highlighted/selected. Profile Viewer is open.
ui_state: Reclassify Points active, 2D mode selected in toolbar toggle, Profile Viewer open
